title: Data Architect
description:
Job Location (Short): Pune, India

Workplace Type: Hybrid

Req Id: 2140

Position Overview

We are seeking a hands-on Data Engineering Architect to design and build scalable data pipelines, implement cutting-edge Generative AI features, and architect robust data solutions. This role requires a technical leader who can translate business requirements into sophisticated data architectures while actively contributing to code development and system implementation.

Roles & Responsibilities

Architecture & Design


Design and implement end-to-end data pipelines supporting batch and real-time processing
Architect scalable data solutions using modern cloud-native patterns and microservices
Develop comprehensive data strategies integrating traditional databases with cloud data platforms
Lead technical decision-making for data platform evolution and technology stack optimization


Generative AI & Machine Learning


Build and deploy Generative AI features using AWS Bedrock foundation models
Implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures with vector databases
Design ML inference pipelines with proper monitoring, scaling, and cost optimization
Integrate AI/ML capabilities into existing data workflows and applications


Hands-On Development


Write production-quality code in Java and Python for data processing and API development
Develop data transformation logic, ETL/ELT processes, and data quality frameworks
Implement event-driven architectures using messaging systems and stream processing
Build and maintain data integration connectors and APIs


Data Platform Management


Optimize data storage strategies across relational databases and cloud data warehouses
Implement data governance, security, and compliance frameworks
Monitor and optimize system performance, reliability, and cost efficiency
Establish CI/CD pipelines for data infrastructure and applications


Required Technical Skills

Programming Languages


Java: 5+ years of experience with Spring Framework, microservices, and enterprise applications
Python: Strong proficiency in data processing libraries (Pandas, NumPy), API frameworks (FastAPI, Flask)


Cloud & AWS Services


AWS Bedrock: Experience with foundation models, model fine-tuning, and inference endpoints
Core AWS Services: S3, EC2, Lambda, IAM, VPC, CloudFormation/CDK
Messaging & Streaming: SQS, SNS, Kinesis, and Apache Kafka
Search & Analytics: OpenSearch/Elasticsearch for full-text search and analytics


Database Technologies


Snowflake: Data warehouse design, performance optimization, and integration patterns
MySQL: Advanced SQL, query optimization, replication, and high-availability configurations
SQL Server: T-SQL, stored procedures, SSIS/ETL development, and performance tuning


Data Engineering Tools


Workflow orchestration (Apache Airflow, AWS Step Functions, or similar)
Data processing frameworks (DBT, Apache Spark, Dask, or similar)
Container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes, ECS/EKS)
Version control and CI/CD (Git, Jenkins, GitLab CI, BitBucket, etc. )


Education / Qualifications

Experience & Background


7+ years in data engineering, software architecture, or related technical roles
3+ years of hands-on experience with AWS services in production environments
Experience with large-scale data processing (TB/PB scale datasets)
Background in building real-time analytics or ML-powered applications


Domain Knowledge


Experience with building reporting solutions that provides insights to the end users.
Experience working with LLMs and building ML features for the users.
Understanding of Quality Management Systems, data privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA) and security best practices
Experience with data mesh, data fabric, or modern data architecture patterns
Knowledge of DevOps practices and infrastructure-as-code methodologies
Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools (CloudWatch, Datadog, ELK stack)


Soft Skills


Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with attention to detail
Excellent communication skills with ability to explain complex technical concepts
Experience mentoring junior developers and leading technical initiatives
Collaborative mindset with cross-functional teams (product, data science, engineering)
Proven ability to convert POCs into production-grade solutions.


Education Requirements


Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related technical field
Master's degree preferred but not required with sufficient experience
Relevant AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, Data Engineer) are a plus


What You'll Build


Scalable data pipelines processing millions of events daily
GenAI-powered features enhancing user experiences and business insights
Real-time analytics systems supporting critical business decisions
Robust data infrastructure supporting multiple business units and use cases


Growth Opportunities


Lead architecture decisions for next-generation data platform
Drive adoption of emerging AI/ML technologies and best practices
Mentor and grow a team of talented data engineers
Shape data strategy and technical roadmap for the organization


About Octave

Octave provides mission-critical software that empowers organizations to make informed decisions across every stage of the asset lifecycle — Design, Build, Operate and Protect — where performance, safety, and reliability are non-negotiable and failure is not an option.

Turning complex operational data into actionable intelligence, Octave connects expertise, real-world conditions and enterprise-scale insight to improve performance, resilience and incident response where it matters most.

Octave has approximately 7,200 employees in 45 countries. Learn more at octave.com and follow us on LinkedIn.

Why work for Octave?

All in. Always forward. That's the way we do things around here. We put trust in our people because we believe it's the best way to unleash potential, bring ideas to life, and keep moving ahead. And it's why we're committed to creating an environment that's truly supportive, providing you with the resources you need to support your ambitions, no matter who you are or where you are in the world.

Everyone is welcome

At Octave, we believe that diverse and inclusive teams are critical to the success of our people and our business. Here, everyone is welcome. As an inclusive workplace, we don't discriminate. In fact, we embrace differences and are fully committed to creating equal opportunities, an inclusive environment, and fairness for all.

Respect is the cornerstone of how we operate, so speak up and be yourself. You're valued here.

title: Sr Business Analyst
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Business Analyst to join our product engineering team. This role is embedded within technology development and works closely with Engineering, Product Management, QA, and Operations to design, refine, and deliver scalable workflow-driven solutions.

The ideal candidate brings strong analytical depth, technical credibility, and hands-on experience working within complex, rule-based SaaS systems.

Core Responsibilities

Translate business and operational needs into clear, implementable user stories and acceptance criteria

Model end-to-end workflows, including exception handling and state transitions

Collaborate closely with Engineering during design and build cycles

Validate functionality using data and system behavior

Support production triage and root cause analysis

Drive clarity in ambiguous problem spaces and challenge incomplete requirements

Mentor junior BAs where applicable

Mandatory Skills & Experience

Technical & Analytical

Hands-on experience writing and executing SQL queries for data validation and analysis

Strong understanding of system workflows and backend data flows

Ability to independently analyze production issues and support root cause investigation

Experience working within Agile product development teams

Product & Workflow Design

Experience collaborating on UI designs using Figma or similar tools

Ability to create detailed process maps, user journeys, and workflow documentation

Strong experience defining business rules and configuration logic

Delivery & Ownership

Writes clear, testable user stories with structured acceptance criteria

Breaks down epics into implementable increments

Participates actively in backlog refinement, sprint planning, and demos

Drives UAT coordination and validation

5+ years of Business Analyst experience in product or technology development environments

Experience working in SaaS or enterprise workflow-driven systems

Healthcare Experience Required

3–5+ years of experience in US Healthcare technology, preferably within claims processing, submissions workflows, eligibility, or revenue cycle systems

Strong understanding of the US claim lifecycle, including submission flows, payer interactions, rejections, and exception handling

Experience working with systems that support payer-facing workflows, clearinghouse interactions, or regulated healthcare transaction processing

Familiarity with US healthcare operational and compliance considerations impacting submissions and workflow design

Good to Have

Understanding of REST APIs and JSON payload structures

Experience documenting integration flows or data mappings

Experience in healthcare technology or regulated industries

Familiarity with batch processing or event-driven systems

Experience with reporting or dashboard tools

Exposure to operational KPI definition and performance metrics

Experience Mentoring Or Leading Other Analysts

Familiarity with tools such as Postman, Azure DevOps, JIRA, Confluence

Benefits

Veradigm believes in empowering our associates with the tools and flexibility to bring the best version of themselves to work. Through our generous benefits package with an emphasis on work/life balance, we give our employees the opportunity to allow their careers to flourish.

title: UIUX - Executive
description:
Position: UI/UX Designer

Experience: 1-3 Years

Location: Pune (On-Site)

About Amura

Amura Marketing is a next-generation Martech company that delivers end-to-end marketing and sales solutions to leading brands in India. Our approach combines design, engineering, data, and technology to create digital experiences that are visually engaging, user-friendly, and aligned with business outcomes.

This role is adapted from the structure and expectations of your earlier design JD, but refined for a junior-level UI/UX Designer with stronger visual design capability and relevance to the current AI-enabled design environment.

Role Summary


We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with 1-3 years of experience to join our team in Pune.
The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in visual design, website and landing page layouting, and basic user experience principles.
This role requires someone who can contribute as a visualiser, meaning the person should be able to convert a creative brief, brand direction, or reference into compelling digital concepts and polished interface designs.
The candidate should be comfortable working on website pages, campaign landing pages, digital assets, and UI layouts, while collaborating with design leads, developers, content teams, and account managers. Familiarity with modern AI-assisted design workflows will be an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


Visual Design and Creative Execution


Create visually strong and brand-aligned designs for websites, landing pages, microsites, and digital interfaces.

Develop page mockups, section designs, banners, and visual concepts based on project briefs.

Contribute as a visualiser by exploring multiple design directions and converting ideas into polished layouts.

Ensure all designs maintain strong visual hierarchy, typography, colour balance, spacing, and overall composition.


UI/UX Design Support


Prepare wireframes, screen layouts, and interface structures based on business and user requirements.

Apply basic UX principles to ensure clarity, ease of navigation, and usability.

Design layouts that support customer journeys, call-to-action visibility, and responsive behaviour across devices.

Create designs that are responsive, mobile-friendly, and optimised for different screen sizes.

Work under the guidance of senior team members to continuously improve design quality and user experience.


Design Tools and Workflow


Use Figma for wireframing, visual design, prototyping, and collaborative reviews.

Follow established design systems, style guides, and brand guidelines.

Maintain well-structured and organised design files for internal collaboration and development handoff.

Use AI-assisted tools, where relevant, for concept exploration, design ideation, and creative acceleration under team guidance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration


Work closely with UI/UX leads, developers, content teams, and project stakeholders.

Understand project requirements and incorporate feedback in a timely and effective manner.

Support smooth design-to-development handoff by preparing clear and implementation-friendly files.

Participate in design reviews, internal discussions, and project meetings as required.


Quality and Consistency


Ensure consistency in design execution across screens, pages, and digital assets.

Maintain attention to detail in layout structure, content alignment, and responsive design behaviour.

Follow basic accessibility and usability best practices.

Deliver work within timelines and quality expectations.

Required Qualifications


1-3 years of relevant experience in UI design, visual design, web design, or digital creative design.
Strong portfolio demonstrating work in website design, landing pages, campaign layouts, or digital interfaces.
Prior visualiser experience is important for this role.
Good working knowledge of Figma.
Basic understanding of UI/UX principles, responsive design, and digital user journeys.
Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.


Must-Have Skills


Strong visual design sense with good understanding of typography, layout, spacing, colour, and composition.
Experience in creating website layouts, landing pages, and digital design mockups.
Good understanding of responsive and mobile-friendly design for websites, landing pages, and digital interfaces.
Ability to work as a visualiser and generate creative design directions from a brief.
Good proficiency in Figma.
Familiarity with AI-assisted design tools such as Lovable, Google AI Studio, Claude, or image generation tools.
Basic understanding of UI components, user flows, and screen structure.
Ability to interpret brand guidelines and apply them consistently across designs.
Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn.


Good-to-Have Skills


Knowledge of Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.
Exposure to design systems and reusable UI components.
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS for better coordination with development teams.
Understanding of accessibility-friendly design practices.
Prior experience in agency, digital, or Martech environments.


Preferred Candidate Profile


Creative and visually strong, with a good eye for digital aesthetics.
Able to balance visual appeal with usability and clarity.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple projects.
Open to feedback and able to improve designs through iteration.
Interested in learning modern tools, including AI-assisted design workflows.

title: EH-FY26-Consulting-Tech Strategy-Consultant-Data Strategy
description:
Summary

Position Summary

Job Description - Strategy & Transactions – Strategy (Consultant) At Deloitte Strategy & Transactions (S&T), we don’t just advise — we architect the future. Our team is uniquely positioned at the intersection of strategy and execution, empowering clients to tackle their most pressing challenges and unlock transformative growth. We work with C-suite executives, Boards, and business leaders to answer the questions that matter most — from navigating complex M&A and driving digital transformation, to reshaping operating models and unlocking new market opportunities. We are trusted advisors during our clients' most critical, high-stakes moments. But we don’t stop at client impact — we are equally passionate about investing in our people. At S&T, you’ll be part of a dynamic team culture that accelerates leadership development, fosters curiosity, and delivers hands-on experience at the forefront of strategy and transactions. We design differentiated career paths that empower our talent to thrive. Our capabilities span the full lifecycle of transformation — from Enterprise and Growth Strategy to Enterprise Technology and Transformation Strategy , end-to-end M&A, valuation and modeling, and performance improvement & restructuring, to infrastructure & real estate advisory and sustainability-driven innovation. If you’re looking to work where bold thinking meets real-world impact — and where your growth matters as much as your clients’ — Strategy & Transactions is your next move. The team

Our Strategy practice brings together several key capabilities that will allow us to architect integrated programs that transform our clients’ businesses, including Corporate & Business Unit Strategy, Technology Strategy & Insights, Enterprise Model Design, Enterprise Cloud Strategy and Business Transformation.

Strategy professionals will serve as trusted advisors to our clients, working with them to make clear data-driven choices about where to play and how to win, in order to drive growth and enterprise value.

Work you will do:

Deloitte’s ‘Strategy’ offering helps companies address the entire range of top management challenges including pursuing new growth opportunities, developing go-to-market strategies, channel strategies, and pricing strategies. As a Technology Strategy Consultant with expertise in Data Strategy, you will:


Provide strategic direction, understand business goals, and define how data can be leveraged to drive innovation, competitive advantage, and business growth for client organizations.
Work closely with clients to solve strategic issues pertaining to Data, governance, architecture, and oversee the successful implementation, ensuring they align with the broader technology and business strategies.


Required Experience And Skills

Enterprise Technology and Transformation Strategy (Data Strategy)


Candidates are required to have at least one full project experience on either one or more of the following areas of Data Strategy:
Enterprise Data Management – Strong understanding of data management process across the data lifecycle (MDM, ingestion, storage, transformation) with experience in evaluating the client's data landscape and architecture to identify opportunities for improvement.
Data Ambition & Value Realization – Having a long track record of delivering data / analytics / AI related change at an enterprise level in a particular industry or sector and helping shape a value creation story specific to the client competing in a particular market.
Data Platform & Architecture Design – Knowledge of data and AI platforms and architecture frameworks
Data Operating Model Design – Having a strong understanding of data and AI capabilities, and the ability to design operating model clearly defining roles, responsibilities, and RACI for the data organization.
Data Governance Strategy – Assessing current data and AI governance practices and maturity within client organizations, having the ability to define and implement data governance strategies and frameworks for organizations.
Strong understanding of data, analytics, and AI technology stack and infrastructure with exposure to new age technologies such as Generative AI.
Ability to articulate leading business issues and trends including the associated technology and data implications within one or more industries.
Demonstrate application of business acumen while leveraging data and analytics
One life cycle project execution experience in recommending and/or implementing data strategy and solutions for improving business outcomes.
Experience of being a data Product Owner and responsible for delivering product model and communicating the product needs with business partners.
Exposure to working with non-India Geographies (preferably the US) and / or interacting with Global stakeholders.


Core Consulting


Clear and concise communication - conduct client interviews, participate in workshops/trainings and present recommendations.
Good client presence – interact and build relationships with clients and other team members.
Analytical thinking - ability to perform detailed, quantitative analysis and research (primary and secondary). Synthesize and present insights and recommendations from data.
Logical structuring - structured approach to problem solving and ability to perform root cause analysis of client problems.
Deadline-oriented and quality focused - develop and own development of deliverables. own and manage specific work-thread, develop plans for components of engagement, manage and mentor junior resources.
Collaboration - Be able to work both independently and as part of a team with professionals at all levels. Be able to prioritize tasks, manage change in scope, work on multiple assignments, and raise concerns/questions where appropriate.
Networking - Ability to chart one’s own career and build networks within the organization.


Qualifications

Required:


MBA, MS, M. Tech. from a premier school in India or abroad
1-3 years of relevant experience required (post MBA / MS / MTech)
1-2 years with single industry focus (preferred)


Our purpose

Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

Our people and culture

Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

Professional development

At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .

Benefits To Help You Thrive

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

Recruiting tips

From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: QA - Manual Testing with BFSI Domain (AI Testing Additional Advantage)
description:
Position Type

Full time

Type Of Hire

Experienced (relevant combo of work and education)

QA - Manual Testing with BFSI Domain (AI Testing Additional Advantage)

Are you curious, motivated, and forward-thinking? At FIS you’ll have the opportunity to work on some of the most challenging and relevant issues in financial services and technology. Our talented people empower us, and we believe in being part of a team that is open, collaborative, entrepreneurial, passionate and above all fun.

About The Team

The Capital Markets AI/ML CoE team is a horizontal CoE for Capital Markets that is helping us drive revenue and bring significant savings to our businesses by identifying, exploring, and implementing AI/ML solutions.

The Capital Markets is one of the two verticals in FIS. It has various products and solutions in funds management, cleared derivatives, commercial lending, corporate treasury, insurance risk electronic trading, RegTech, wealth and retirement etc.

The team consists of highly motivated solution architects, data scientists and ML engineers.

What You Will Be Doing

As a Software Test Analyst Senior, you will be working on testing and automating cutting-edge AI/ML solutions across the organization.

What You Bring

Knowledge / Experience


Responsible for requirement analysis and test plan design, test data preparation with wide coverage of functionalities, Test automation framework creation and its maintenance, general QA activities which include defect reporting and tracking, effective stakeholder engagement, CI/CD and materialize automation and innovation opportunities to improve productivity
Contribute towards QA Automation to increase test coverage and maintain and share automation progress and stats with management
Participate in Agile Activities and contribute to achieving defined goals for each sprint
Automation of test scenarios and redundant manual tasks using innovative ideas is the primary focus
Build an understanding of the product on a technical and functional level, understand the context of our clients, participate in solution design, drive testing activities, and deliver solutions that address the business needs
Work with the Business Analyst and Solution Architect as well as with experienced people in the team to understand project requirements, and identify requirement gaps, and functional risks so that these can be addressed early in the process.
Evaluate test data and/or engineer test data to be used throughout the software development life cycle
Drive all phases of test execution and documentation including functional, regression, performance, usability, integration, and acceptance testing
Work closely with other team members like Developers, and BAs in a team to ensure better turnaround for issue resolution and change implementation
Implement processes to improve the quality of deliverables, create and maintain a repository of documents, and train and guide junior team members
Ensure quality of newly built or enhanced features and regression test to make sure nothing is broken


Skills


8-12+ years of hands-on experience in functional and Automation testing (Backend and Frontend) and thorough understanding of industry-wide QA processes
Knowledge of methods, tools, and technology used in software testing – Jira, test case management tool, and version control tools like bitbucket
Thorough Knowledge of capital markets domain, financial software, and related middle and back-office processes
Hands-on experience in SQL, PL/SQL, and creating SQLs to pull data from multiple tables using joins
Understanding of UNIX/Linux commands and scripting
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to meet deadlines, goals, and objectives within assigned time
Ability to communicate effectively verbally and in writing


Added Bonus If You Have (Desirable Skills)


Knowledge of SCRUM and experience in working agile is preferred
Performance Testing and Non-Functional Testing experience


Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in engineering or related field or the equivalent combination of education, training, or work experience

Competencies


Fluent in English
Excellent communicator – ability to discuss technical and commercial solutions to internal and external parties and adapt depending on the technical or business focus of the discussion
Attention to detail – track record of authoring high-quality documentation
Organized approach – manage and adapt priorities according to client and internal requirements
Self-starter but team mindset - work autonomously and as part of a global team


What We Offer You


A multifaceted job with a high degree of responsibility and a broad spectrum of opportunities
A broad range of professional education and personal development possibilities – FIS is your final career step!
A variety of career development tools, resources and opportunities


Privacy Statement

FIS is committed to protecting the privacy and security of all personal information that we process in order to provide services to our clients. For specific information on how FIS protects personal information online, please see the Online Privacy Notice.

Sourcing Model

Recruitment at FIS works primarily on a direct sourcing model; a relatively small portion of our hiring is through recruitment agencies. FIS does not accept resumes from recruitment agencies which are not on the preferred supplier list and is not responsible for any related fees for resumes submitted to job postings, our employees, or any other part of our company.

title: Lead - Operations and Service
description:
Location Name: Pune Corporate Office - Mantri

Job Purpose

Lead the Customer Centricity & Compliance governance across a portfolio of customer journeys, Businesses, Sales, Product, Service, Collections, Operations.

The Manager is responsible for end to end governance oversight, ensuring every product/tech change is customer centric, policy aligned, and regulatory compliant before going live.

The role provides strategic leadership, ensures consistent governance quality across cluster teams, manages escalations, interfaces with senior stakeholders, and drives process maturity for the entire function.

Duties And Responsibilities

Skills & Competencies: -


 Expertise in user story review, risk/control design, CX frameworks, and compliance requirements.
 Ability to interpret regulatory guidelines and implement them in product/tech workflows.
 Strong command over Azure, Req Ease, test management tools, audit documentation, and reporting frameworks.
 Experience with customer impact assessments, negative case identification, and data privacy principles.
 Strong communication and documentation skills
 High influencing ability and stakeholder management strength.
 Excellent problem-solving, decision-making, and analytical thinking.
 Ability to manage ambiguity and provide clear guidance to teams.
 High accountability, integrity, and customer-first thinking.
 Ownership and accountability for assigned tasks
 Strong leadership, coaching, and team development skills|Core Responsibilities: -
 Drive the governance framework across all assigned squads, ensuring timely and high quality CX & compliance sign offs.
 Serve as the principal governance reviewer for high-risk or high-impact journeys.
 Ensure governance is embedded early in the lifecycle—backlog refinement to final release.
 Translate new regulations, circulars, and internal policies into actionable guidance for Product, Tech, and Ops teams.
 Ensure adherence to standards such as customer fairness, data privacy, consent, disclosures, grievance norms, and regulatory codes of conduct.
 Oversee CX impact assessments, privacy reviews, negative case design, and mitigation strategies.
 Ensure customer harm scenarios are anticipated and controlled through preventive mechanisms.
 Work closely with senior stakeholders across Product, Business, IT, QA, Legal, Risk, Compliance, Service, and Operations.
 Own KRIs/KPIs for the assigned domain and publish governance dashboards to leadership.
 Track repeat issues, trends, and process breakdowns; ensure continuous improvement.
 Identify gaps in the governance lifecycle and implement structural improvements.
 Drive standardization of checklists, templates, and governance playbooks.
 Explore automation opportunities for evidence capture, workflow approvals, and compliance tagging
 Lead and guide a team of 3–6 members (direct/indirect reports).
 Conduct quality reviews, coaching, and skill-building to uplift functional maturity.
 Build a strong work allocation, governance calendar, and quality assurance rhythm.
 Conduct regular 1:1s, performance reviews, upskilling plans, and feedback cycles.
 Lead root-cause analysis for non-compliance issues, misses, or customer-impacting incidents
 Support internal and external audits by providing timely, accurate data & reports
 Sign off, approve documentation, checklists, UAT evidence, and decisions for low/medium-risk items
 Act as escalation point for squads facing governance delays, regulatory interpretation issues, or CX conflicts.
 Take decisions on medium/high-risk issues, with only critical items escalated to National Lead
 Block releases on customer harm or compliance breach risks
 Owns prioritization of team workload and approval of governance evidence



Required Qualifications And Experience

Qualifications: -


 Graduates with strong, relevant experience in customer experience, compliance, audits.
 Post Graduate qualification in Management, Business, Analytics, or a related discipline.



Work Experience: -


 7-11 years of relevant experience in Business analysis, Product/Process Governance Product Operations, Risk / Compliance support, QA/UAT roles, COEs
 Minimum 3-5 years exposure to leading teams or mentoring junior resources
 Experience in BFSI / NBFC / Regulatory Compliance is preferred.
 Basic working knowledge of regulatory concepts (data privacy, fair treatment, disclosures).

title: Remote Software Engineer (Python)
description:
About the projects: we are building LLM evaluation and training datasets to train LLM to work on realistic software engineering problems. One of our approaches, in this project, is to build verifiable SWE tasks based on public repository histories in a synthetic approach with human-in-the-loop; while expanding the dataset coverage to different types of tasks in terms of programming language, difficulty level, and etc.




About the Role:

We are looking for experienced software engineers (tech lead level) who are familiar with high-quality public GitHub repositories and can contribute to this project. This role involves hands-on software engineering work, including development environment automation, issue triaging, and evaluating test coverage and quality




Why Join Us?

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems. You’ll be at the forefront of evaluating how LLMs interact with real code, influencing the future of AI-assisted software development. This is a unique opportunity to blend practical software engineering with AI research.




What does day-to-day look like:

Analyze and triage GitHub issues across trending open-source libraries.
Set up and configure code repositories, including Dockerization and environment setup.
Evaluating unit test coverage and quality.
Modify and run codebases locally to assess LLM performance in bug-fixing scenarios.
Collaborate with researchers to design and identify repositories and issues that are challenging for LLMs.
Opportunities to lead a team of junior engineers to collaborate on projects.




Required Skills:

Minimum 3+ years of overall experience
Strong experience with at least one of the following languages: Python
Proficiency with Git, Docker, and basic software pipeline setup.
Ability to understand and navigate complex codebases.
Comfortable running, modifying, and testing real-world projects locally.
Experience contributing to or evaluating open-source projects is a plus.




Nice to Have:

Previous participation in LLM research or evaluation projects.
Experience building or testing developer tools or automation agents.
Perks of Freelancing With Turing:
Work in a fully remote environment.
Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.




Offer Details:

Commitments Required: At least 4 hours per day and minimum 20 hours per week with overlap of 4 hours with PST. (We have 3 options of time commitment: 20 hrs/week, 30 hrs/week or 40 hrs/week)
Employment type: Contractor assignment (no medical/paid leave)
Duration of contract: 3 month; [expected start date is next week]




After applying, you will receive an email with a login link. Please use that link to access the portal and complete your profile.




Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

title: Research Scientist
description:
A Moving Experience.

Do you have a passion for pushing the boundaries of innovation? Are you excited about AI’s potential to improve the human experience? Then come join the ride!

Who is Cerence ai?

Cerence ai is the global leader in AI for transportation, specialized in building AI and voice-powered companions for cars, two-wheelers, and more that enable people to focus on what matters most. With over 500 million cars shipped with Cerence ai technology, we partner with leading automakers (such as Volkswagen, Mercedes, Audi, Toyota and many more), mobility providers, and technology companies to power intuitive, integrated experiences that create safer, more connected, and more enjoyable journeys for drivers and passengers alike.

Our Driving Force

Our team is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of AI innovation, working around the globe with headquarters in Burlington, Massachusetts, USA and 16 other offices across Europe, Asia, and North America. We bring together diverse backgrounds and varied skill sets with the shared goal of advancing the next generation of transportation user experiences. Our culture is customer-centric, collaborative, fast-paced, and fun, with continuous opportunities for learning and development to support your career growth.

Interested in having a significant impact in a dynamic industry with a high-performing global team?

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Research Scientist specializing in Speech Recognition to drive advanced research and development in NLP, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, generative AI, and large language models (LLMs). This role will focus on building state-of-the-art ASR systems, applying retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and finetuning techniques, leveraging agentic AI frameworks, and utilizing cloud platforms for scalable deployments. Person should be well-versed in the latest advancements in speech recognition technology, including Generative AI, large language models (LLMs), Agentic AI framework and exposure to Cloud platforms. This role offers a unique opportunity to impact the next generation of speech AI technologies, working with cutting-edge LLMs and agentic AI frameworks under a collaborative and innovative environment.

Your Impact:


Conduct applied research to develop, train, and optimize speech recognition models incorporating NLP, deep learning, and generative AI techniques.
Design and experiment with LLMs and RAG models for improved conversational AI systems.
Drive finetuning and domain adaptation strategies for enhancing model performance on multilingual and low-resource speech data.
Work with agentic AI frameworks to enable advanced workflow orchestration and stateful agent interactions.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including other AI researchers and scientists, to seamlessly integrate features and functionalities.
Collaborate with engineering teams to implement and deploy scalable cloud-based AI pipelines and services.
Analyse and preprocess large-scale speech datasets, ensuring high-quality data management for model training.
Publish research findings in internal and / or external conferences, actively participate in hackathons and contribute to the scientific community.
Mentor junior researchers and contribute to knowledge sharing and technical leadership within the team.



What you bring:


PhD or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Computational Linguistics, or related fields.
Strong expertise in speech recognition, NLP, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI.
Experience with end-to-end ASR systems or multi-modal AI models.
Proven experience with LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and model finetuning.
Familiarity with agentic AI frameworks and their application in conversational or speech systems.
Proficiency in Python, deep learning frameworks (PyTorch or TensorFlow), and software engineering best practices.
Experience with large-scale speech data processing and annotation.
You possess excellent problem-solving skills, attention to detail, analytical thinking, and a collaborative mindset to work effectively within our fast-paced and innovative environment.
Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate across multidisciplinary teams.



Preferred Qualifications:


Publications in major AI, speech, or NLP conferences.
Knowledge of distributed computing and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).



What We Offer:


Annual bonus opportunity
Insurance coverage
Paid time off
Paid holidays
Equity-based awards for some positions and levels
Remote and/or hybrid work available depending on position.



All compensation and benefits are subject to the terms and conditions of the underlying plans or programs, as applicable and as may be amended, terminated or superseded from time to time.

Cerence Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNC and www.cerence.com) is the global industry leader in creating unique, moving experiences for the automotive world. Spun out from Nuance in October 2019, Cerence is a new, independent company that has quickly gained traction as a leader in the automotive voice assistant space, working with all of the world’s leading automakers – from Ford and Fiat Chrysler to Daimler, Audi and BMW to Geely and SAIC – to transform how a car feels, responds and learns. Its track record is built on more than 20 years of industry experience and leadership and more than 500 million cars on the road today across more than 70 languages.

As Cerence looks to the future and continues an ambitious growth agenda, we need someone to join the team and help build the future of voice and AI in cars. This is an exciting opportunity to join Cerence’s passionate, dedicated, global team and be a part of meaningful innovation in a rapidly growing industry.

EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER

Cerence is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination on the basis of age, race, color, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sex, sex stereotyping, pregnancy, national origin, ancestry, religion, physical or mental disability, medical condition, marital status, citizenship status, sexual orientation, protected military or veteran status, genetic information and other protected classifications. Cerence Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement.

All prospective and current Employees need to remain vigilant when it comes to executing security policies in the workplace. This includes:


Following workplace security protocols and training programs to familiarize with the ways to maintain a safe workplace.
Following security procedures to report any suspicious activity.
Having respect for corporate security procedures to allow those procedures to be effective.
Adhering to company's compliance and regulations.
Encouraging to follow a zero tolerance for workplace violence.
Basic knowledge of information security and data privacy requirements (e.g., how to protect data & how to be handling this data).
Demonstrative knowledge of information security through internal training programs.

title: Demand Planning Lead
description:
Company Description

Scott Sheldon India Pvt. Ltd., located in Nagpur, is a branch office of Scott Sheldon LLC, Ohio. For over 20 years, we have been helping companies improve and transform their supply chain operations using world-class technologies. In 2020, we formed a strong partnership with a leading supply chain software provider. We have delivered many successful projects, won major industry awards, and continue to grow by implementing advanced supply chain solutions for our customers.




Role Description

We are looking for an experienced Demand Planning Lead (5–10 years) to join our Mumbai-based team as part of our Supply Chain Planning practice.

In this role, you will act as the primary demand planning subject matter expert across client engagements, leading planning execution, driving process maturity, and building long-term planning capability.

This is a high-impact, client-facing role combining deep expertise in demand planning platforms with strong business acumen and stakeholder management. You will work across industries and planning environments, applying structured methodologies to drive measurable improvements in forecast accuracy and planning effectiveness.




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field (or equivalent experience)
5–10 years of experience in demand planning, supply chain planning, or consulting/advisory roles.
Hands-on expertise with APS platform Blue Yonder.
Strong understanding of statistical forecasting (time series, causal models, ML-based forecasting, model selection)
Experience managing and facilitating S&OP and Consensus Demand Review processes
Ability to analyse and interpret planning KPIs (MAPE, bias, Forecast Value Add)
Strong analytical skills with proficiency in Excel and data analysis; BI/reporting tools a plus
Experience working in client-facing or project-based environments
Strong communication skills — ability to present insights clearly to both technical and business stakeholders

Preferred

Familiarity with ERP–APS integration concepts (SAP, Oracle, etc.)
Experience in post-go-live APS stabilization / optimisation
APICS CPIM, IBF CPF, or similar certification
Exposure to data quality management and planning master data governance




What you will do




Demand Planning Execution

Lead statistical forecasting activities including model selection, algorithm tuning, and parameter management within APS platforms
Manage demand forecast exceptions, applying structured exception management protocols and override governance
Monitor and analyze forecast accuracy, bias, and forecast value add (FVA) metrics; identify root causes and drive corrective actions
Support and facilitate Consensus Demand Review and S&OP processes, coordinating inputs across commercial, supply, and finance stakeholders
Execute and govern the demand planning cycle in line with agreed weekly and monthly cadences




Client Engagement & Advisory

Act as the primary demand planning point of contact for client teams, providing expert guidance on platform capabilities and planning best practices
Advise clients on forecast segmentation strategies, statistical model selection, and override governance frameworks
Translate client business objectives and commercial strategy into actionable demand planning configurations and process design
Deliver regular performance reporting and KPI scorecards to client leadership




System Support & Continuous Improvement

Provide Level 2 functional support for APS demand planning platforms, including root cause analysis and resolution of planning system issues
Monitor data quality inputs to planning systems; identify integrity issues and coordinate resolution with client data owners
Identify gaps, workarounds, and opportunities for business rule and configuration improvements
Support enhancement request prioritization and liaise with software vendors on platform-related issues as appropriate
Maintain documentation of planning processes, system configuration logic, and best practice guidelines




Knowledge Transfer & Capability Building

Develop structured knowledge transfer assets — process guides, playbooks, and decision frameworks — to support client self-sufficiency
Mentor and coach junior planning resources within team
Contribute to the development of internal methodologies, tools, and thought leadership within the Supply Chain Planning practice




What We Offer.

Competitive salary + performance bonuses
Flexible work mode (Remote / Hybrid / Office)

  

Why Join Us:

Kinaxis Platinum Partner for Kinexions-2025.
Awarded ‘Most Value-Added Reseller’ by Kinexions.
Scottsheldon Part of Argo & Co
Successfully completed numerous global projects
Hands-on experience with real-world supply chain challenges and solutions.
Collaborative and supportive work environment.
Career growth and advancement opportunities.

title: Financial Reporting
description:
Job Description

Elevate your career with us as a Financial Reporting Specialist, where precision meets opportunity. Be part of a dynamic team that values your expertise in financial statement preparation and regulatory compliance. Embrace the chance to innovate and lead in a fast-paced environment.

Job Summary

As a Financial Reporting Specialist within our Financial Services team, you will be responsible for preparing primary financial statements and related notes in accordance with accounting and regulatory disclosure requirements. You will liaise with partner sites for external deliveries and communicate status effectively. You will also interact with stakeholders to address any accounting or financial reporting-related queries.

Job Responsibilities


Prepare primary financial statements and related notes per accounting and regulatory requirements.
Review financial statements for numerical accuracy and disclosure quality.
Liaise with partner sites for external deliveries and timely status communication.
Interact with stakeholders to address accounting or financial reporting queries.
Act on process improvement opportunities and recommend changes.
Ensure adherence to risk and control checks for client portfolios.
Follow required checklists and SOPs, updating post-audit cycles.
Collaborate with internal control team on arising issues.
Encourage team efficiency and idea generation.
Manage initiatives alongside daily workload.
Work under pressure to meet tight deadlines.

Possess 3+ years of experience in Financial Reporting or Audit in the Funds industry.
Hold a postgraduate degree/CA/CPA with a major in Finance/Accounting.
Work effectively within a team and build key internal relationships.
Demonstrate strong attention to detail in document review and analytical capabilities.
Understand all primary GAAPs – Irish/UK, IFRS, US GAAP.
Work under pressure and meet tight deadlines during peak delivery times.
Implement change, efficiencies, and manage initiatives alongside daily tasks.

Exhibit advanced proficiency in financial reporting software.
Demonstrate leadership in process improvement initiatives.
Communicate effectively with cross-functional teams.
Adapt quickly to changing regulatory environments.
Showcase problem-solving skills in complex scenarios.
Mentor junior team members for skill development.

title: Lead Data Scientist
description:
Our Mission




Our goal is for everyone to make bolder choices with their finances.




To get there, we're creating an all-in-one ecosystem of financial services for today's generation of goal-getters. That feat takes extraordinary people-those with the guts to challenge the way things are and transform them into something better.




To be part of Team Maya is to be Bolder for Better.




NATURE OF WORK

Leadership & Delivery

Identify opportunities wherein artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) can exert a substantial influence, dissecting these challenges into precise requirements for AI solutions.
Formulate lucid and succinct roadmaps delineating AI and machine learning initiatives, adeptly communicating them to all stakeholders and ensuring alignment with the overarching business strategy.
Define project scopes, deliverables, timelines, and resource allocation.
Assess the business impact and effectiveness of solutions.
Advocate for the integration of AI and machine learning methodologies throughout the organization.
Enhance existing processes and operational methods to elevate current efficiencies.
Foster innovation by advocating for unconventional, novel applications of new technologies and algorithms.
Collaborate closely with business leaders, data scientists, engineers, and other stakeholders to formulate and execute a comprehensive AI and machine learning strategy tailored to the bank's needs.




Technical Skills

Lead the translation of high-level business problems into actionable, technical Data Science frameworks.
Drive innovation by developing and deploying sophisticated machine learning and AI models as required.
Validate the methodologies, analytical approaches, and codebases of developers to ensure strict alignment with both technical standards and business requirements.
Relay the results of model developments to stakeholders, providing clarity on the impact and value of the team's technical outputs.

People Management

Actively mentor both senior and junior developers, guiding their progress in technical expertise and soft-skill development.
Build individual career plans for your team members, ensuring their professional trajectory aligns with organizational goals.

title: Software Engineer I / II (Backend)
description:
Description

YouTrip is the leading and fastest-growing multi-currency payment platform in Asia Pacific. In 2018, we pioneered the region's first multi-currency digital wallet. Now, YouTrip is the #1 multi-currency digital wallet trusted by millions across the region, processing over US$15 billion in total payment value annually.

Our consumer and business propositions – YouTrip and YouBiz – empower individuals and businesses with inclusive, accessible, and affordable financial solutions. YouTrip has raised over US$110 million to date, including its recent Series B round led by global venture capital firm Lightspeed Venture Partners—underscoring strong investor confidence in its mission to transform digital financial services across the Asia Pacific.

Recognised as World Economic Forum’s Global Innovator 2025, CNBC’s World’s Top Fintech Companies (2025, 2024), and LinkedIn’s Top Startup (2024, 2023), YouTrip is dedicated to creating the next generation of digital finance services for consumers and businesses.

Valuing an entrepreneurial culture of diversity and inclusion, we are seeking driven individuals to join our fast-growing regional team as we push the boundaries of innovative fintech solutions.

Job Description

Role: Software Engineer (Backend)

Location: Chennai

Model: Work from Office

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Engineer with an exceptional command of Golang (other backend tech stacks are also considered, based on the profile) to join our dynamic team. As a Software Engineer, you will play a pivotal role in designing and developing high-performance, scalable, and secure server-side applications using Golang. Your expertise shall be instrumental in building robust, reliable, and efficient solutions that drive the success of our projects.

Responsibilities


Design and develop sophisticated, high availability, and secured server-side applications.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements, architect solutions, and deliver high-quality software products.
Analyze and optimize performance, scalability, and reliability of existing Golang applications, making strategic improvements where necessary.
Design and implement automated unit and integration tests to ensure code quality, maintainability, and stability.
Stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in software technologies, recommending their adoption when appropriate.
Participate and contribute to code reviews, architectural discussions, and technical documentation to maintain high development standards.
Troubleshoot and resolve complex issues, providing innovative solutions to overcome challenges.
Contribute to the recruitment and hiring process by participating in interviews, evaluating candidates, and providing input on hiring decisions.


Requirements


Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, or a related field.
3+ years of experience in software development, with substantial experience in Golang (preferred) and cloud infrastructure.
Good proficiency in designing and developing high-performance, concurrent applications.
Experience in distributed systems, microservices architecture, and containerization (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
Solid knowledge of software testing methodologies and tools, including unit testing and integration testing.
Demonstrated ability to lead projects, collaborate effectively with teams, and mentor junior engineers.
Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to tackle complex technical challenges.
Having prior experience in the FinTech domain would be an added advantage.


To apply

If you are interested in this position, please click Apply Now and send in your CV. Due to the high volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Investment Banking Analyst
description:
Investment Banking Analyst (Graduates and Experienced Hires) - Bengaluru

Please apply to Mumbai on our separate vacancy if that is closer to your location







Our Client

Our subsidiary CF Invest, is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on positions in the investment sector.




We are recruiting on behalf of our client, one of the bulge bracket bank and pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices on an ongoing basis through the first half of each year, with the view of onboarding immediately or upon graduation.




Our client is looking for two professionals to join their Investment Banking team in Bengaluru as an Analyst and use their skills and ideas to make an impact on the success of the bank. You will either be placed in their FIG, TMT or Energy Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry including but not limited to Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications




Graduate – Analyst

Bachelor’s degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations
We consider any degree or subject and although your grade indicates your ability to absorb data and apply it, your degree grade does not influence your chance of applying to us and being interviewed.







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

Analyst annual base salary of 125,000 and up to 150,000 United States Dollars depending on experience. Your salary will be paid in Indian Rupees and bonus in USD
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers
Relocation is provided by the company

title: Full Stack Developer (React & Node )
description:
Your potential, unleashed.




India’s impact on the global economy has increased at an exponential rate and Deloitte presents an opportunity to unleash and realize your potential amongst cutting edge leaders, and organizations shaping the future of the region, and indeed, the world beyond.

At Deloitte, your whole self to work, every day. Combine that with our drive to propel with purpose and you have the perfect playground to collaborate, innovate, grow, and make an impact that matters.




What impact will you make?




Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services, Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential

Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.




The Team




Deloitte Digital has created a new model for a new age: the creative digital consultancy. We're transforming the digital journey in a way an agency or traditional consultancy alone cannot–now leaders across their entire organization can come to one place to have their ambitions brought to life. We combined the creative and digital capabilities of our studios and the broad reach of an advertising agency with the technical experience, deep business strategy, and relationships of one of the world's largest consultancy to create something that is so much more than the sum of its parts. We can help you imagine bigger and scale as your business grows. Learn more about Digital




Work you’ll do







Role: Full Stack Software Engineer (React & Node.js)




Designation: Senior Consultant

Location: Bangalore

Notice period: Immediate Joiner

Education: B. Tech




Position Overview




The Full Stack Software Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and operating scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications for enterprise platforms. This role focuses on building modern full-stack systems using React for front-end development and Node.js for backend services, while leveraging cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure.

As part of the Enterprise Services – Data & AI organization, the engineer will contribute to platforms that power AI-enabled workflows and enterprise applications across the organization. The role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams including architects, product owners, security teams, and engineers to build reliable, enterprise-grade solutions.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using React.js for front-end and Node.js for back-end services.
Build scalable and secure enterprise applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and microservices architecture.
Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and enterprise services to enable AI-powered workflows and enterprise platforms.
Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability.
Design and optimize SQL database schemas, queries, and data storage solutions.
Implement CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation using tools such as GitHub Actions and Terraform.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver solutions aligned with Agile and DevOps methodologies.
Write clean, testable, well-documented code to support maintainability and long-term platform development.
Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and agile ceremonies.
Implement best practices related to security, compliance, and enterprise software standards.
Contribute to AI-enabled systems, including technologies such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), NLP pipelines, and automation workflows.
Support enterprise platforms with capabilities such as identity-aware APIs, observability, and edge services.




Required Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.
Good to have Experience in Python
5+ years of professional experience in software development (or 3+ years with an advanced degree).
Strong experience building full-stack web applications.
Proficiency in React.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.
Backend development experience with Node.js and RESTful APIs.
Experience working with SQL databases and data modeling.
Experience deploying applications on AWS and/or Azure cloud platforms.
Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and version control systems such as GitHub.
Strong understanding of responsive front-end design and scalable backend architecture.




Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with Docker and containerization technologies.
Familiarity with Kubernetes or container orchestration platforms.
Exposure to AI technologies such as RAG, NLP, LLMs, or agent-based workflows.
Experience building or consuming secure, identity-aware APIs.
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver end-to-end solutions.
Understanding of Agile and DevOps best practices.
Curiosity and willingness to explore complex enterprise software platforms and emerging technologies.




How you’ll grow




At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world-class skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.







Benefits

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.




Our purpose

Deloitte is led by a purpose: To make an impact that matters.

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world




Recruiter tips

We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: HRIS Workday - Senior
description:
At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Join EY and help to build a better working world.

Service line -People Consulting Position Title: HR Operations – Senior Consultant

At EY, we’re all in to shape your future with confidence.

We’ll help you succeed in a globally connected powerhouse of diverse teams and take your career wherever you want it to go.

Join EY and help to build a better working world.

About Global Delivery Services

Global Delivery Services refers to EY's worldwide network of service delivery centers. The GDS team plays an important role in EY’s strategy by ensuring effective support to EY’s growth agenda.

Our journey started in 2002 with approximately 200 people. Today we stand at 80,000+ professionals in ten locations around the world. We operate in Argentina, China, Hungary, India, Philippines, Poland, Sri Lanka, Mexico, Spain and the United Kingdom.

Client service is focused on providing Consulting, Assurance, Tax, Strategy & Transactions, and Knowledge support to our clients around the world. The teams enable account teams worldwide to provide seamless, high-quality, value-added support, helping deliver exceptional client service.

Enablement Services provides cost-effective, high-skilled, and innovative services to support EY’s global and local enablement teams. Markets, BMC, AWS, Finance and Accounting, Risk Management, Procurement, People Shared Services, IT Service Delivery and IT Global Infrastructure services, are among the services offered by Enablement Services.

Our innovation specialists serve the GDS Client Service and Enablement Services teams, along with Service Lines, Core Business Services and Sectors. The team brings the desired environment, technologies and skilled teams together for facilitation, rapid prototyping and innovative thinking. The competencies offered include analytics, digital, user experience, mobile technology, infrastructure, Microsoft technologies and open innovation.

The Opportunity

Lead end-to-end HR Operations excellence—from onboarding through offboarding—by driving data integrity, process standardization, and compliance across HRIS, payroll, and benefits. Orchestrate background checks, employment verifications, and HR documentation at scale while building analytics and reporting that inform decisions. Partner with HR, IT, and Compliance to streamline workflows, elevate employee experience, and enable audit readiness. Deliver continuous improvement through SOPs, automation, and KPI-driven governance to reduce cycle times, increase accuracy, and enhance risk controls.

Your Key Responsibilities


Maintain accurate and compliant employee data within the HRIS, including regular audits, reconciliations, and data integrity checks.
Produce recurring and ad hoc HR reports and dashboards that provide insights for leadership and support data-driven decision-making.
Prepare and issue HR letters and employment verifications, ensuring accuracy, confidentiality, and adherence to HR standards.
Oversee background check coordination and support compliance with labor laws, HR policies, audit requirements, and document retention standards.
Lead process documentation, optimization, and automation initiatives to improve efficiency, consistency, and control across HR operations.
Deliver responsive employee and manager support, addressing inquiries and guiding users on HR policies, procedures, and self-service tools.


Skills And Attributes For Success


4–6 years HR Operations / HR Shared Services experience
Strong HR process knowledge across the employee lifecycle
Good HRIS experience (Workday, ServiceNow)
Solid background in employee data management and reporting
Experience with HR letters, verifications, and compliance workflows
Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and confidentiality
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
Process improvement mindset with ability to streamline workflows


Ideally, you’ll also


3–5 years HR Operations or HR Shared Services experience
Hands-on experience with HRIS transactions and workflows (Workday, ServiceNow)
Exposure to HR data audits, reconciliations, and reporting
Strong understanding of Hire to Retire HR processes
Solid documentation, analytical, and process mapping skills
Experience supporting process improvements and operational initiative


What We Look For


HR Operations professional with strong exposure across employee lifecycle processes, HRIS transactions, data management, and compliance.
Skilled in HR process execution, data accuracy, documentation, reporting, and workflow coordination across HR platforms and shared services environments.
Experienced in partnering with HR, IT, and cross-functional teams to translate operational needs into scalable, efficient HR processes.
Adept at troubleshooting HRIS issues, managing audits, supporting SLAs, and delivering high-quality operational support in fast paced environments, with strong expertise in data management and HR service delivery.


What We Offer You

At EY, we’ll develop you with future-focused skills and equip you with world-class experiences. We’ll empower you in a flexible environment, and fuel you and your extraordinary talents in a diverse and inclusive culture of globally connected teams. Learn more.

Are you ready to shape your future with confidence? Apply today.

To help create an equitable and inclusive experience during the recruitment process, please inform us as soon as possible about any disability-related adjustments or accommodations you may need.

Our Commitment: As a commitment, we persistently endeavour to embody our values, fulfil our purpose, and champion inclusiveness. Our dedication is to cultivate EY into an environment where diverse perspectives are celebrated, creating a supportive atmosphere for individuals to authentically be themselves and contribute their utmost.

Professional Development: From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe in continuous learning. We offer opportunities to build new skills, take on leadership roles, and connect and grow through mentorship.

People and Culture: In our dynamic workplace, diversity, equity, and inclusiveness are ingrained in our culture. We're united by a commitment to create an environment where every individual's differences are valued, practices are equitable, fostering a sense of belonging. Our shared values include integrity, respect, teaming, inclusiveness, energy, enthusiasm, courage to lead, and building relationships based on doing the right thing.

Benefits: Embark on a transformative career journey with us and indulge in a suite of premium benefits, encompassing exclusive health and wellness packages, enticing rewards, and cutting-edge learning opportunities that empower you to continually grow and excel in your professional and personal development.

How to Apply: If you are passionate to join us and are aligned with our commitment to building a better working world, we invite you to apply by completing our user-friendly form with personal and professional information and by providing your consent to data privacy.

Successful candidates advance to a competency-based interview. If mutual interest persists, a job offer awaits.

“We are an equal opportunity employer and are committed to Diversity, Equity & Inclusion”.

EY | Building a better working world

EY is building a better working world by creating new value for clients, people, society and the planet, while building trust in capital markets.

Enabled by data, AI and advanced technology, EY teams help clients shape the future with confidence and develop answers for the most pressing issues of today and tomorrow.

EY teams work across a full spectrum of services in assurance, consulting, tax, strategy and transactions. Fueled by sector insights, a globally connected, multi-disciplinary network and diverse ecosystem partners, EY teams can provide services in more than 150 countries and territories.
